---
title: ""
page-layout: article
---

::: {.snuc-org-hero}
<div class="snuc-org-hero-content">
<div class="snuc-eyebrow">Beyond Academia</div>
<h1>Organizational Intelligence</h1>
<p class="lead">Network analysis and strategic consulting for organizations, government, and collaborative ecosystems. We bring rigorous relational methods to real organizational and policy decisions.</p>
</div>
:::

::: {.snuc-stats}
<div class="snuc-stat"><span class="number">11</span><span class="label">Research areas</span></div>
<div class="snuc-stat"><span class="number">4</span><span class="label">Active research grants</span></div>
<div class="snuc-stat"><span class="number">5</span><span class="label">Countries in our network</span></div>
:::

---

## Education & Professional Training

::: {.snuc-org-section .section-alternating}
<div class="snuc-org-visual">
<div class="network-container large">
<canvas class="diplomado-network"></canvas>
</div>
<p class="network-caption">Krackhardt's high-tech managers advice network. Color = department · shape = hierarchy (◆ CEO, ■ VP, ● manager) · size = advice ties.</p>
</div>
<div class="snuc-org-text">
<h3>Diplomado en Inteligencia Relacional para Organizaciones</h3>
<div class="role-large">Professional training across sectors · May – December</div>
<p>A comprehensive diploma program for professionals from diverse disciplines — HR, communications, innovation, consulting, organizational development, public affairs, research, and entrepreneurship.</p>
<p>Learn to understand, measure, and visualize relational structures in organizations and collaboration ecosystems, from informal influence networks to knowledge exchange and strategic positioning.</p>
<p class="note">Offered subject to sufficient enrollment.</p>

<h4 style="margin-top: 2rem;">Specialized Courses & Workshops</h4>
<p>We also offer targeted training on social network analysis, statistical modeling of networks, computational methods, and organizational network analysis — designed for professionals and organizations across all sectors seeking to leverage network science for collaboration, innovation, and strategic decision-making.</p>
</div>
:::

---

## Consultancy & Organizational Diagnostics

::: {.snuc-org-section}
<div class="snuc-org-text">
<h3>Bring Network Analysis to Your Organization</h3>
<div class="role-large">Diagnostics, training, and applied research partnerships</div>
<p>We are open to advisory and consultancy work applying network analysis to organizational, governmental, and civil-society settings:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>Organizational mapping</strong> — visualize collaboration structures and communication flows</li>
<li><strong>Governance diagnostics</strong> — analyze decision-making networks and identify bottlenecks</li>
<li><strong>Strategic interventions</strong> — design data-informed organizational changes</li>
<li><strong>Innovation ecosystems</strong> — understand and strengthen knowledge-sharing networks</li>
<li><strong>Applied research</strong> — partner on custom network science projects</li>
</ul>
<p style="margin-top: 2rem;"><strong>Ready to explore organizational intelligence for your organization?</strong> <a href="contact.qmd">Get in touch with us</a>.</p>
</div>
<div class="snuc-org-visual">
<div class="network-container large">
<canvas class="consultancy-network"></canvas>
</div>
<p class="network-caption">Lazega's corporate law firm collaboration network. Color = practice area · ◆ partner, ● associate · size = collaboration ties.</p>
</div>
:::

---

## Strategic Alliance

::: {.snuc-org-alliance}
<div class="alliance-content">
<h3>CHISOCNET — Chilean Society for Social Network Science</h3>
<p>The Social Networks Group – UC is an active partner of CHISOCNET, which aims to develop social network science in Chile into an internationally recognized field of reference for Ibero-America — through conferences, seminars, and a summer school.</p>
<p><a href="https://www.chisocnet.org" class="btn-alliance">Visit CHISOCNET →</a></p>
</div>
<div class="alliance-logo">
<img src="img/partners/chisocnet.svg" alt="CHISOCNET logo">
</div>
:::
